response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analyzed to identify the performer as Raora Panthera and the song as 'Draw.'. 2. Searched to confirm song details and official lyrics. 3. Transcribed lyrics from the on-screen text as it is the official source. 4. Video divided into three scenes: performance, conversational talk, and static outro. 5. English translation generated for the Japanese lyrics of 'Draw.'.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D musical performance by the VTuber Raora Panthera singing her original song 'Draw.', followed by a short conversational segment with her audience and a final static outro screen.

scenes.description: The video begins with a musical performance of 'Draw.' by Raora Panthera. The singer performs on a stage with changing backgrounds and lighting. Lyrics are displayed on-screen throughout the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
At last, hold my true colors
ほどけた輪郭も
そっと、ずっと、重なって
私の形になる
静かな始まりに
目覚めた色を抱いて
I'm drawing out my true colors
滲んだ輪郭も
淡く、脆く、煌めいて
形になってゆくの
夜明けの面影を
集めた色で描く
Draw it slow, draw it true
Draw it slow, draw it true
夢のぬくもりと
指先に絵の具の匂い
ありふれた朝の先には
まだ知らない色が
溢れてる
Draw it slow, draw it true
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
At last, hold my true colors
The unravelled outline too
Softly, always, layering
Becoming my shape
At the quiet beginning
Holding the colors that awakened
I'm drawing out my true colors
The blurred outline too
Faintly, fragilely, glittering
Becoming a shape
The traces of dawn
Painting with the colors I gathered
Draw it slow, draw it true
Draw it slow, draw it true
With the warmth of a dream
The smell of paint on my fingertips
Beyond the ordinary morning
Colors I still don't know
Are overflowing
Draw it slow, draw it true

scenes.description: The song ends, and the singer talks to the audience, thanking them for watching the birthday live stream.
A static outro image with a closing message from the singer is displayed on screen until the video ends.
